# ClubOS
## Community Discovery, Activity, Reputation & Gamification Platform

---

# Vision

ClubOS is a platform where people discover and join real-world communities through activities.

Instead of focusing on communication like Discord or WhatsApp, ClubOS focuses on:

- Discovery
- Participation
- Recognition
- Reputation
- Community Growth

The platform acts as a Community Operating System for clubs of all kinds:

- Sports clubs
- Developer communities
- Photography clubs
- Hobby groups
- Student organizations
- Professional associations
- Volunteer organizations

---

# Positioning

> Strava meets Meetup for every kind of community.

Users discover activities.

Activities lead to participation.

Participation creates reputation.

Reputation creates belonging.

---

# Problem

Communities currently use fragmented tools.

| Function | Current Tool |
|----------|-------------|
| Discovery | Instagram, Facebook |
| Registration | Google Forms |
| Membership | WhatsApp, Discord |
| Payments | Bank Transfer, Eventbrite |
| Recognition | Manual |
| Reputation | None |

This creates friction for both organizers and members.

---

# Core Product Principles

## Activity First

Users discover communities through activities.

Not:

"I want to join a basketball club."

But:

"I want to play basketball this weekend."

Activities are the primary growth engine.

---

## Real-World Participation

The platform rewards attendance and contribution.

Not likes.

Not followers.

Actual participation.

---

## Every Club Is Different

A basketball club should not be gamified like a developer community.

Each club can create its own progression system.

---

## Recognition Drives Retention

Badges, achievements, leaderboards and challenges create reasons to come back.

---

# Core Entities

## User

A member of the platform.

### Attributes

- Profile
- Avatar
- Bio
- Location
- Interests
- Reputation
- Badges
- Activity history
- Connected Instagram

---

## Club

A community.

### Attributes

- Name
- Description
- Logo
- Category
- Location
- Reputation
- Members
- Activities
- Badges
- Challenges
- Leaderboards

---

## Activity

A real-world event.

### Examples

- Weekly Basketball
- AI Meetup
- Photo Walk
- Chess Tournament

### Attributes

- Title
- Description
- Location
- Time
- Capacity
- Price
- Organizer
- Approval Mode
- Attendance Tracking

---

## Badge

Recognition earned by members.

### Sources

- Participation
- Achievement
- Challenge
- Season
- Club Roles

---

## Challenge

Time-limited objectives.

### Examples

- Attend 5 events this month
- Join 3 basketball games
- Complete a 10K run

---

## Leaderboard

Competition system inside a club.

Can track:

- Attendance
- Performance
- Participation
- Contributions

---

# User Experience

## New User Homepage

Users immediately see nearby activities.

### Feed Priorities

1. Distance
2. Interests
3. Friends Attending
4. Popularity
5. Recency

### Activity Card

- Cover Image
- Club
- Distance
- Date
- Price
- Attendee Count
- Join Button

Users do not need to join clubs before joining activities.

---

# User Journey

Discover Activity

↓

Join Activity

↓

Pay (Optional)

↓

Attend

↓

Earn Badge

↓

Gain Reputation

↓

Follow Club

↓

Join More Activities

---

# Club Pages

## Overview

- Description
- Reputation
- Member Count
- Activity Count

## Activities

- Upcoming
- Past

## Badges

Available badges.

## Challenges

Active challenges.

## Leaderboards

Current rankings.

## Endorsed Content

Approved member posts.

---

# Membership Types

## Public

Anyone can join.

## Approval Required

Admin approval required.

## Invite Only

Invitation required.

---

# Registration Flow

## Open Registration

Immediate acceptance.

## Approval Registration

Requires review.

## Waitlist

Automatically queues excess members.

---

# Payments

## Free Activity

No payment.

## Paid Activity

Fixed fee.

## Donation Activity

Optional contribution.

Future integrations:

- Midtrans
- Xendit
- Stripe

---

# Attendance Verification

## QR Check-In

Organizers generate attendance QR.

Benefits:

- Accurate attendance
- Automated badge awards
- Fraud prevention
- Reputation tracking

---

# Reputation System

## User Reputation

Generated from:

- Attendance
- Volunteering
- Hosting
- Winning challenges
- Receiving endorsements

---

## Club Reputation

Generated from:

- Attendance rates
- Event consistency
- Member retention
- Community reviews

---

# Interest Graph

Users can follow interests.

Examples:

- Basketball
- Running
- AI
- Photography
- Chess
- Music

Recommendations use interests instead of only club memberships.

---

# Badge System

## Philosophy

Badges should reward participation, contribution, improvement and achievement.

Not only top performers.

Everyone should be able to earn something.

---

# Default Badge Templates

Every club automatically receives:

### First Participation

Awarded after the first verified attendance.

---

# Category Badge Templates

## Basketball Club

- First Participation
- MVP 2026
- Top Scorer
- Playmaker
- Defensive Wall
- 5 Games Played
- Tournament Winner

---

## Running Club

- First Participation
- 5K Finisher
- 10K Finisher
- Distance Champion
- Consistency Champion

---

## Developer Community

- First Participation
- Speaker
- Mentor
- Hackathon Finisher
- Open Source Contributor

---

## Photography Club

- First Participation
- Featured Shot
- Community Favorite
- Photo Walk Finisher

---

# Custom Badge Creator

Club admins can create unlimited custom badges.

## Badge Configuration

- Name
- Description
- Icon
- Category
- Requirement
- Visibility
- Expiration

---

# Badge Types

## Participation

Attend activities.

## Achievement

Win competitions.

## Role

Mentor, Organizer, Volunteer.

## Challenge

Complete objectives.

## Season

Earned during club seasons.

---

# Club Gamification System

## Goal

Allow every club to build their own progression system.

The platform provides tools.

The club decides the rules.

---

# Points System

Optional.

Example:

| Action | Points |
|----------|----------|
| Join Activity | 5 |
| Attend Activity | 10 |
| Volunteer | 20 |
| Win Challenge | 50 |
| Earn Badge | 15 |

Every club can customize values.

---

# Micro Leaderboards

Inspired by Strava.

Instead of one giant leaderboard, create many small opportunities to win.

---

## Examples

### Basketball

- Most Points This Week
- Most Assists This Month
- Most Games Attended
- MVP Season 2026

### Running

- Longest Distance This Week
- Fastest 5K This Month
- Most Consistent Runner

### Developer Community

- Most Events Attended
- Most Talks Given
- Most Helpful Mentor

### Photography

- Most Featured Photos
- Most Community Votes

---

# Personal Progress Achievements

Not everyone can be #1.

The platform should also reward improvement.

Examples:

- First Activity
- First Competition
- 5 Activities Completed
- Personal Best
- Most Improved Member
- Attendance Streak

This ensures new members feel rewarded immediately.

---

# Seasons

Clubs can create seasons.

Example:

Basketball Season 2026

Awards:

- MVP 2026
- Top Scorer 2026
- Most Improved 2026

At season end:

- Winners recorded
- Leaderboards archived
- Seasonal badges awarded

---

# Community Challenges

Clubs can launch limited-time challenges.

Examples:

- Attend 5 events in June
- Join 3 games this month
- Volunteer twice this quarter

Challenge completion grants badges and points.

---

# Endorsement System

## Mention

Users mention clubs.

Example:

"Great event today @BalikpapanDev"

---

## Review

Club receives:

- Endorse
- Ignore

---

## Endorsed Content

If approved:

- Appears on club page
- Appears on activity page
- Receives official endorsement badge

This enables community-generated content while preventing spam.

---

# Instagram Integration

## User Accounts

Users can connect Instagram profiles.

---

## Club Accounts

Clubs can connect Instagram Business or Creator accounts.

---

# Promote Activity

Workflow:

Create Activity

↓

Generate Poster

↓

Generate Caption

↓

Publish to Instagram

↓

Track Activity Performance

---

# Achievement Sharing

Members can share:

- Badges
- Challenge Completion
- Leaderboard Wins
- Activity Attendance

Example:

"I just earned MVP 2026 from Balikpapan Basketball Club."

---

# Future AI Features

## Event Poster Generator

Generate social-ready promotional images.

## Caption Generator

Generate event captions.

## Badge Designer

Generate badge concepts and artwork.

## Challenge Generator

Suggest community challenges.

## Community Insights

Analyze retention and engagement.

---

# Non Goals (V1)

Not included:

- Chat
- Forums
- Voice Channels
- Video Calls
- Livestreaming
- Marketplace

Communication should remain on Discord, WhatsApp or Telegram.

ClubOS owns:

- Discovery
- Participation
- Recognition
- Reputation
- Gamification

---

# MVP Scope

## User

- Sign Up
- Profile
- Location
- Interests

## Club

- Create Club
- Manage Members
- Club Page

## Activities

- Create Activity
- Join Activity
- Approval Workflow
- QR Attendance

## Feed

- Nearby Activities
- Recommendations

## Badges

- Template Badges
- Custom Badges
- Badge Awards

## Gamification

- Points
- Attendance Leaderboards
- Challenges

## Social

- Mentions
- Endorsements

## Instagram

- Share Activity
- Share Achievements

---

# North Star Metric

Monthly Verified Participation

Definition:

The number of unique users who physically attend verified activities each month.

Because the mission is not to maximize content creation.

The mission is to maximize real-world community participation.
